## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] perf — performance
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] chore — build/tooling/deps

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:int` passes (or N/A)
- [ ] Migrations added if entities changed (`pnpm migration:gen`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, README) if behavior/architecture changed
- [ ] No secrets committed
